title: Stay Hydrated
content: Aim for 8 glasses of water daily. Proper hydration supports digestion, circulation, and brain function.
contentKo: Aim for 8 glasses of water daily. Proper hydration supports digestion, circulation, and brain function.

title: Sleep Hygiene
content: Maintain a consistent sleep schedule. Avoid screens 1 hour before bed.
contentKo: Maintain a consistent sleep schedule. Avoid screens 1 hour before bed.

title: Headache Prevention
content: Common triggers include dehydration, poor posture, and eye strain. Take regular breaks from screens.
contentKo: Common triggers include dehydration, poor posture, and eye strain. Take regular breaks from screens.

title: Hand Washing
content: Wash hands with soap for at least 20 seconds. This simple act prevents many infections.
contentKo: Wash hands with soap for at least 20 seconds. This simple act prevents many infections.

title: Walking Benefits
content: Just 30 minutes of daily walking reduces heart disease risk by 35%.
contentKo: Just 30 minutes of daily walking reduces heart disease risk by 35%.

title: Stress Management
content: Practice deep breathing: inhale 4 sec, hold 4 sec, exhale 6 sec.
contentKo: Practice deep breathing: inhale 4 sec, hold 4 sec, exhale 6 sec.

title: Balanced Nutrition
content: Follow the plate method: 1/2 vegetables, 1/4 protein, 1/4 whole grains.
contentKo: Follow the plate method: 1/2 vegetables, 1/4 protein, 1/4 whole grains.

title: Eye Care
content: Follow the 20-20-20 rule: every 20 minutes, look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
contentKo: Follow the 20-20-20 rule: every 20 minutes, look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.

title: Flu Prevention
content: Get vaccinated annually. Flu season peaks between December and February.
contentKo: Get vaccinated annually. Flu season peaks between December and February.

title: Posture Check
content: When sitting, keep feet flat, back supported, and screen at eye level.
contentKo: When sitting, keep feet flat, back supported, and screen at eye level.
